_comment: LLM-as-judge reviewer panel. Each reviewer = persona (prompt-as-data) + provider + model. Model ids and API keys come from the environment; defaults below are overridable via REVIEW_<PROVIDER>_MODEL env vars (the OpenAI/Gemini defaults are placeholders -- set them to the latest ids you have access to). API keys: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY.
